title: post api v1 update dock with valid data
description: Test the POST /api/v1/update-dock endpoint with valid JSON payload containing dock_id, progress, safety_issue, and current_task. Verify that the response status is 200 OK, confirmation is received, and the data is correctly saved to dock_status.csv.

title: post api v1 update dock with malformed json
description: Test the POST /api/v1/update-dock endpoint with malformed JSON payload missing required fields such as dock_id. Verify that the response status is 400 Bad Request with appropriate validation error message and that dock_status.csv remains unchanged.

title: get smart yard dashboard html after data update
description: After a successful POST to /api/v1/update-dock, test GET /smart_yard_dashboard.html to verify that the dashboard HTML is regenerated and reflects the latest dock and safety data with a 200 OK response.

title: get smart yard dashboard html during regeneration
description: Test GET /smart_yard_dashboard.html during the dashboard regeneration process triggered by a data update. Verify that the response status is 503 Service Unavailable with a 'regenerating' message, and that subsequent requests after regeneration return 200 OK with updated HTML.

title: get api v1 analytics dday with valid dock id
description: Test GET /api/v1/analytics/dday with a valid dock_id parameter. Verify that the response status is 200 OK and the JSON payload contains dock_id, current_progress, daily_productivity_rate, days_remaining, and projected_completion_date.

title: get api v1 analytics insights with valid dock id
description: Test GET /api/v1/analytics/insights with a valid dock_id parameter. Verify that the response status is 200 OK and the JSON payload contains dock_id, risk_level, and recommended_actions such as 'reallocate_resources' or 'safety_inspection'.

title: get api v1 analytics with unknown dock id
description: Test GET /api/v1/analytics/dday and /api/v1/analytics/insights with an unknown dock_id parameter. Verify that the response status is 404 Not Found with an error message 'dock not found'.

title: get api v1 export dock csv with data available
description: Test GET /api/v1/export-dock-csv when dock data is available. Verify that the response status is 200 OK with Content-Disposition header for attachment and the CSV payload contains the dock data.

title: get api v1 export dock csv with no data
description: Test GET /api/v1/export-dock-csv when no dock data rows are available. Verify that the response status is 204 No Content or 200 OK with an explanatory header, and the client prompts the user that no data is available for export.
